recommendations.title: Les Cowboys
recommendations.overview: Drama about a father and son who set out to find their missing daughter/sister with the help of an American headhunter.

recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.

recommendations.title: The Old Way
recommendations.overview: An old gunslinger and his daughter must face the consequences of his past, when the son of a man he killed years ago arrives to take his revenge.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
recommendations.overview: As the railroad builders advance unstoppably through the Arizona desert on their way to the sea, Jill arrives in the small town of Flagstone with the intention of starting a new life.

recommendations.title: El Topo
recommendations.overview: El Topo decides to confront warrior Masters on a trans-formative desert journey he begins with his 6 year old son, who must bury his childhood totems to become a man.

recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.

recommendations.title: 3 Godfathers
recommendations.overview: Three outlaws on the run discover a dying woman and her baby. They swear to bring the infant to safety across the desert, even at the risk of their own lives.

recommendations.title: Death Rides a Horse
recommendations.overview: Bill Meceita, a boy whose family was murdered in front of him by a gang, sets out 15 years later to exact revenge. On his journey, he finds himself continually sparring and occasionally cooperating with Ryan, a gunfighter on his own quest for vengean

recommendations.title: Meek's Cutoff
recommendations.overview: A group of settlers traveling through the Oregon High Desert in 1845 find themselves stranded in harsh conditions.
